intro: Lepisorus longifolius, also known as the Chinese maidenhair fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Polypodiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including inflammation, fever, and respiratory issues, due to its potential health benefits. The bioactive constituents of Lepisorus longifolius include flavonoids, alkaloids, and phenolic acids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
